title: How one hard thing before 8 AM rewires your whole day
caption:
The most important moment of your day happens before most men open their eyes.

Not because the workout matters that much. Not because the alarm time is sacred. But because the decision you make in that first moment — to get up or stay — is the one your whole day is built on.

Win it, and you've proven something before the world asks a single thing of you. You've beaten the man who was going to drift, before he even got started.

Miss it, and every soft choice that follows has a precedent.

It doesn't have to be epic. One hard thing. Scripture before the phone. Cold shower. Twenty minutes. Make the bed. Whatever it is — do it before you're asked.

"Whatever you do, work at it with all your heart, as working for the Lord." — Colossians 3:23.

Save this for the morning you don't feel like it. That's the one that counts.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #morningroutine #thework #christianity
